signals.headline: SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][3]
signals.raw:
SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][3]

The U.S. SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit against Ripple has been confirmed as resolved, driving XRP's 10% weekly gain to ~$1.42 after breaking $1.50 resistance, signaling a shift to institutional acceptance.[1][2] This regulatory clarity removes a multi-year overhang, boosting sentiment amid RLUSD stablecoin ro
